pi_items.source: Task description directly specifies this path.
Task description directly specifies this path.
Task description explicitly lists these channel gain assignments. OpenBCI documentation confirms that 12x, 24x, and 8x are valid gain configurations for the Cyton board.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to save a screenshot to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/gain_config.png' and create a report at '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/gain_report.txt'. The channel gain configurations (Channels 1 & 2 to 12x, Channels 3-6 to 24x, and Channels 7 & 8 to 8x) are detailed directly in the task description. Furthermore, OpenBCI official documentation confirms that 12x, 24x, and 8x are valid user-configurable hardware gain settings for the Cyton board.
